The Ukrainan Holocaust

# The Ukrainan Holocaust

[](https://substack.com/@sadashree)

![Ratnakar Sadasyula's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!R73I!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F81a2c542-8b3f-4ade-98d2-a40950cffbe3_2640x1980.jpeg)

[Ratnakar Sadasyula](https://substack.com/@sadashree)

Mar 04, 2021

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Share

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!Z1KS!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F52dedd5a-1a6d-402e-a730-f86f9471e8b3_300x207.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!Z1KS!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F52dedd5a-1a6d-402e-a730-f86f9471e8b3_300x207.jpeg)

While many do have a good idea about the Holocaust in Poland, not many are really aware that Ukraine too suffered a lot. And it had a fairly large Jewish population, too, but even ordinary Ukrainians suffered. More than a million Jews perished in the Holocaust here between 1941 to 1944, while the overall tally was around 4 million.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!H4LE!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F5feb6c03-e9ae-4bd8-a875-798e31bc926d_220x275.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!H4LE!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F5feb6c03-e9ae-4bd8-a875-798e31bc926d_220x275.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

The culprits here were***Einsatzgruppen,***the Nazi death squads, Order Police Batallions and the local Nazi collaborators. Basically Jews, Romani, Communist party members, and Slavs who turned aginst the Nazis were the victims. Not going very much into details, but here are some

**Nikolaev Massacre**- Over 35000 Russisan Jews in this Southern port city were massacred by Nazis.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!kCEe!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fcc5be142-e658-4173-aa98-c6322fecf958_220x132.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!kCEe!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fcc5be142-e658-4173-aa98-c6322fecf958_220x132.jpeg)

**Babi Yar, Ravine near Kiev-**The worst of all the massacres, where 33,000 Jews were killed in a single operation on September 29–30, 1941. Major-General Friedrich Eberhardt, the local military governor ordered this execution. This was the order posted for them.

> *Jews of the city of Kiev and vicinity! On Monday, September 29, you
> are to appear by 08:00 a.m. with your possessions, money, documents,
> valuables, and warm clothing at Dorogozhitskaya Street, next to the
> Jewish cemetery. Failure to appear is punishable by deat*h.

As they gathered there expecting to be loaded into trains, the massacre began. They were marched in groups of 10 to the ravine and shot dead, it was filled with corpses. This was followed by around 100,000 to 150,000 Ukrainian citizens also being massacred.

**Billa Tserkva**- Another ghastly massacre , so grotesque that even Wehrmacht chaplains refused to be part of it. While most of the adult Jewish populaton was shot dead, children were taken to a grave, lined up and shot dead.

**Lviv**- 25 Polish academics massacred in July 1941 to prevent anti Nazi activity and weaken the Polish resistance movement.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!i5J8!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F684d4163-3b2a-42c3-b385-c1a105cba60b_240x329.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!i5J8!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fbucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F684d4163-3b2a-42c3-b385-c1a105cba60b_240x329.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

And the city had a series of pogroms between June and July 1941, targeting it’s Jewish residents. Around 5000 Jews died in them.

Apart from this Ukraine had around 100,000 collaborators, some of them even manned the notorious death camps. Even worse, Ukraine did not prosecute any Nazi war criminal and Ukrainian communists actually collaborated with Nazis.

As per recent estimates around 1.6 million Jews were murdered during the Holocaust in Ukraine. One of the most painful episodes in the country’s history.

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)
